stats.description: Sturdy and comfortable with plenty of leg room, this ride will take you there.
stats.name: Aerodeck

stats.description: Wether it's gonna be a standup fight or just another bughunt, this ship series, designed by AgentBunni, is up for the task.
stats.name: Agent B1
stats.specialDescription: The Agent B1 can deploy and place sneaky bombs on enemies. Shoot to deploy and shoot a second time to detonate.
stats.upgradeDescription: Technichans were able to factoy install a faster engine and power core on the B1.

stats.description: This vessel is one of a kind. It has a very special graphene hud that enables the pilot to trigger short periods of cloaking. Also, when not cloaked, the design is top notch.
stats.name: Assassin-T29
stats.specialDescription: Equipped with a ship specific cloaking device that is not possible copy to other ships.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship is delivered with a super charged engine.

stats.description: Standard space explorer. Durable and sturdy.
stats.name: Astro Falcon

stats.description: The Aurora ship is an identitcal copy of the Supporter V1 class on the inside. But since it was made in an isolated hangar in space the hull looks a bit different.
stats.name: Aurora V2
stats.specialDescription: Is equipped with a boomerang weapon and a light speed boost.
stats.upgradeDescription: A nicely upgraded engine together with a robust hull makes it a reliable spacecraft.

stats.description: Created by a mad man and is used by the nezerians to fight Aureus.
stats.name: Bionic Daemon
stats.specialDescription: Corrosive teeth delivers a fatal and immediate dose of corrosive poison on impact.
stats.upgradeDescription: Doesn't have any pre-installations, it's delivered with basic augmentations.

stats.name: Bionic Larva
stats.specialDescription: Immensely powerful 360 lightning! Can NOT be replicated in the pirate bay.
stats.upgradeDescription: Incredibly slow! Hahahaha....

stats.description: The latest creation of a mad man is a large flying machine with a deadly bite.
stats.name: Bionic Queen
stats.specialDescription: The jaws deals heavy damage to anyone who gets caught between them. Can NOT be replicated in the pirate bay.
stats.upgradeDescription: It's a flying insect, what more do I need to tell you...

stats.description: Noxium is the most toxic substance in the known universe. This ship have a core of Noxium contained in a extremely powerful magnetic field. The weapons are based on releasing a tiny fraction of the core upon firing.
stats.name: C8 Noxium
stats.specialDescription: The core is exposed on death resulting in heavy damage on nearby ships.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship comes with the strong armour needed to contain it's highly dangerous core of Noxium.

stats.description: After creating the the B1 series Agent Bunni disappeared to the outer rim. According to rumors he is the designer of Chrono, but nobody really knows.
stats.name: Chrono
stats.specialDescription: The Chrono Laser deals very high damage in a line infront of the ship.
stats.upgradeDescription: Chrono is well equipped and has a powerfull power source.

stats.description: If you have an "I brake for nobody" attitude, this baby is for you.
stats.name: Collector

stats.description: Its really creamy. And very puffy.
stats.name: Creampuff

stats.description: This ship was constructed on the planet Crynos as a sea probe by the infamous Nightrage. However, Crynos crystal technologies have immense powers and the ship has been transformed into a lethal but very fragile weapon. All other technologies from Crynos have been lost.
stats.name: Crystal
stats.specialDescription: Prismatic crystal hails that carries an immense omni energy causing severe damage.
stats.upgradeDescription: Incredible power and a fairly upgraded engine.

stats.description: The DMAT-90 is a fast and furious ship that is very popular among renegades in Zergilin.
stats.name: DMAT-90
stats.specialDescription: Gatling Laser is one of few mid range energy weapons weapons with short reload time.
stats.upgradeDescription: Comes with decent armor and base equipment.

stats.description: Not much is known about the Eagle Eye series. Manufatured on the planet Valen in a well guarded area, only accessible to the ship designers which also build every part by hand.
stats.name: Eagle Eye
stats.specialDescription: The Eagle Eye is equipped with the "Eagle Needle" which shoots bursts of homing needle projectiles. The needles have an advanced "Shield Steel" technology installed which can magnetically transfer the targets shield energy to your shields.
stats.upgradeDescription: The Eagle eye is equipped with a supercharged engine straight from factory.

stats.description: The Eldorado SE-24 is the latest in Luxury space travel, no expenses spared. The hull of the ship is entirely made out of 24k gold. Unfortunately, gold is not a very useful structural material. So, extremely advanced technology had to be developed to compensate for the ship's structural weakness and immense mass.
stats.name: Eldorado SE-24
stats.specialDescription: The ship comes with a system launching guided solid gold missiles, which attempts to ram its targets. It also come with a Flak Cannon for dealing with close range targets.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship comes with fully upgraded shield, armor, power system, engine, and teleport device for the owners conveniences.

stats.description: The Explorer 062 has a modified power core that reroutes 80% of the weapon system power to the engines. This results in a significant speed boost and makes the ship ideal for long distance travels.
stats.name: Explorer 062
stats.specialDescription: The Explorer 062 has a standard Energy Nova installed on delivery.
stats.upgradeDescription: No premanufactured upgrade.

stats.description: This ship has seen the end of times and the destruction of the universe.
stats.name: Golden Heart
stats.specialDescription: Golden torpedos. This rare weapon is not seen often anymore. Hard to master able to cause massive damage.
stats.upgradeDescription: The gold plating is mostly for the  looks, but underneath is a rock solid hull, a boosted engine+ extra shield and power core.

stats.description: Another one of Xhargregs weird creations.
stats.name: Hellbat
stats.specialDescription: If you enjoy lighting your enemies on fire, the Hellbat is definitely the ship for you.
stats.upgradeDescription: It comes with natural tough armor.

stats.description: Pumpkin.. pumkin.. pumkins everywhere..
stats.name: Horror Pumpkin
stats.upgradeDescription: It comes with Pumpkin Armor, Pumpkin Shields, Pumpin Batteries and Pumpkin Thrusters... to fulfill all your pumpkin needs...

stats.description: A powerful ship based on replicated stolen Aureus technology. A lot of effort went into the creation of this ship.
stats.name: Judicator Prototype
stats.specialDescription: The Judicator comes with three special weapons.
stats.upgradeDescription: The Judicator is delivered with highly effective shields.

stats.description: This military edition served as a heavy fighter in the Stingray nebula wars against the Nezerians. Its massive armor is very difficult to penetrate.
stats.name: Juggernaut
stats.specialDescription: The military juggernaut is specialized in high velocity and rapid fire impact weapons.
stats.upgradeDescription: The Juggernaut is always delivered with extra plating.

stats.description: This rare retro explorer has been a collection item for many space pioneers and is regarded as a must have for any decent collector. The ship was only produces during a limited period.
stats.name: Jupiter
stats.specialDescription: Comes with a standard Energy Nova.
stats.upgradeDescription: Comes with small engine enhancements and a standard armor.

stats.description: The medic ship is a true hero in space with its area of effect healing capabilities. The Medic C2 has served faithfully in the Nezerian Wars.
stats.name: Medic C2
stats.specialDescription: Repair-Nanobot spray is a unique weapon with area of effect healing capabilities.
stats.upgradeDescription: Has a special setup with small amplifiers but high-velocity repeaters.

stats.description: An easy to use and sturdy ship with many good qualitiess. The ship was inspired by an old Agent design but was transformed by a mad scientist in Neurona.
stats.name: Neutron X
stats.specialDescription: A 360 degree particle gun that fires accelerated neutrons.
stats.upgradeDescription: Is delivered with a good engine and a basic shield and armor.

stats.description: A discarded prototype for the Nexar Blade class ship, discovered at a conquered Nexar Hanger. The ship has been heavily modified to allow for a humanoid crew.
stats.name: Nexar Blade
stats.specialDescription: The Nexar Blade is a robust in-fighter. It comes with an extremely deadly Kinetic Phase Blade, excellent armor, and highly optimized systems. However, the design didn’t leave much space for power generators resulting in very poor power regeneration.The weapon CAN NOT be copied to other ships.
stats.upgradeDescription: The Nexar Blade comes with upgraded armor and shields.

stats.description: A prototype for the Nexar Fighter class ship, discovered at a conquered Nexar Hanger. The ship has been heavily modified to allow for a humanoid crew.
stats.name: Nexar Fighter
stats.specialDescription: The Nexar Fighter is an excellent all around ship. Designed to be able to fill multiple roles in the Nexar fleet. It comes with a powerful Nexar Blaster.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship comes with improved armor, engines, power systems and shields.

stats.description: A pristine prototype for the Nexar Shadow class ship, discovered at a conquered Nexar Hanger. The ship has been heavily modified to allow for a humanoid crew.
stats.name: Nexar Shadow
stats.specialDescription: The Nexar Shadow class ship is designed to deal extreme amounts of burst damage, Sacrificing power regen for a larger power pool.  It's ideal for assassination missions.The weapons CAN NOT be copied to other ships.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship comes with an advanced fully upgraded power system as well as high performance engines.

stats.description: A pristine prototype for the Nexar Vindicator class ship, discovered at a conquered Nexar Hanger. The ship has been heavily modified to allow for a humanoid crew, resulting in reduced speed.
stats.name: Nexar Vindicator
stats.specialDescription: The Nexar Vindicator class ship is designed to excel at close to medium range combat. The ship comes with a special teleport device with a variable target range, depending on how long time the devices is charged before use. The weapons CAN NOT be copied to other ships.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship comes with an advanced fully upgraded armor as well as above average shields .

stats.description: nyan nyan nyan nyan
stats.name: Nyan

stats.description: A strange ship of a mysterious origin. It’s still somehow able to maneuver despite the lack of any visible engines. Theories has it that the central orb is involved…
stats.name: Orbiter
stats.specialDescription: The Orbiter comes with a set of devestating lighting based weapons.
stats.upgradeDescription: It comes with a premanifactued complex power system.

stats.description: The pirate series is a set of standard sturdy quality ships that gives that extra piratish look.
stats.name: P1 Patrol

stats.description: A modified version of the P1 model, The modifications includes a new signal system, making sure nobody misses your presence.
stats.name: P1 Pirate
stats.specialDescription: The P1 Pirate is equipped with the missile launcher from start.
stats.upgradeDescription: The engine is souped up (using stolen equipment) on the P1 Pirate.

stats.description: Wow, can you handle the attitude this ship breathes?
stats.name: Pixi

stats.description: For the true law protectors. This ship will not go unnoticed. Pirates beware!
stats.name: Police Pursuit P1
stats.specialDescription: A lightning gun is factory equipped on the Pursuit P1.
stats.upgradeDescription: To get extra proctection from enemies  high impact weapons, this law enforcement vessel is equipped with an extra charged shield.

stats.description: The first ever replica of an Aureus vessel. It was built from salvaged parts and re-painted with AF colors.
stats.name: Portal
stats.specialDescription: You can teleport!
stats.upgradeDescription: Includes a teleportation device and a standard issue blaster.

stats.description: Designed by well known and respected captain NightRage, this ship is surely ready for battle.
stats.name: Prophecy
stats.specialDescription: Hell Fire is a long range burn weapon with rapid fire. If you want to set something on fire from a safe distance this weapon is your choice.
stats.upgradeDescription: The preinstalled dual engine gives an extra boost straight from factory. Health, armor and shield is also factory improved.

stats.description: Rapture is a fighter style ship with high speed and energy weapons for penetrating Nezerian defenses.
stats.name: Rapture
stats.specialDescription: The Plasma Trap, Electroctue and Twin Phaser will make short work of any enemy lacking resistance.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship has a decent engine pre-installed to ease kiting of the mindless bugs.

stats.description: The Antor Federation managed to copy the Aureus projection technology and this is the first prototype with photonic technology.
stats.name: Retro
stats.specialDescription: The photonic blaster is a high-velocity projector that fires photonic particles.
stats.upgradeDescription: Is equipped with a photonic shield but doesn't have a hull.

stats.description: Ho Ho Ho! Merry Christmas! Ho Ho Ho!
stats.name: Rocket Sled
stats.specialDescription: It shoots crates?
stats.upgradeDescription: At least it got excellent engines!

stats.description: Ever wanted to sail the space currents? Then this ride is made for you.
stats.name: Sail Fish
stats.specialDescription: The Piraya shoots homing fishlings that deals area damage on impact.
stats.upgradeDescription: The Sail Fish sports a fiskjet™ engine and boosted scale.

stats.description: Design that ages back to the 1970s combined with state of the art technology enhances the owner with an impression that lasts. Also, believe it of not, this ship can be maneuvered standing up.
stats.name: Scartrow
stats.specialDescription: The Astro Lance is a super heavy impact damage weapon that boomerangs back to the owner. Used properly, this weapon is lethal.
stats.upgradeDescription: Scartrow comes with an engine with a  turbocharged Strontium afterburner + a extra durable hull.

stats.description: Argus Hemel was obsessed by death so he created this shrine as a tribute to his only god.
stats.name: Skeletor
stats.specialDescription: The Skeletor Lightning deals a tingeling "that was not so bad" impact damage. But, the real deal is the debuff dot damage that drains the targets life the seconds after impact.
stats.upgradeDescription: The toxic waste boosted engine gives an extra punch + a hardened hull.

stats.description: This ship was constructed by the only inhabitant of the frozen wastelands of Ronduria. The man and myth (and bastard) Jon Snowball designed this awesome ship and eqipped it with an effective weapon - the Snow Cannon.
stats.name: Snowformer
stats.specialDescription: The Snow Cannon is not only humiliates the enemy - it also delivers a pretty good punch.
stats.upgradeDescription: The snowformed is delivered with a super charged engine.

stats.description: Once upon a time there was a footballmanager who traveled into space and created a new ship prototype. A rumour says it was named by a legendary game that was played a thousand years ago.
stats.name: Spacetrick

stats.description: This ship was constructed and design to honor one of the greatest wiki contributor and space pioneer in the Antor system.
stats.name: Spy-1
stats.specialDescription: The Infested Missile reduces enemy resistance against kinetic damage.
stats.upgradeDescription: All abilities are accessible but with low upgrades.

stats.description: The Supporter ship class was made to fund the Astroflux project and its devote developers.
stats.name: Supporter V1
stats.specialDescription: Is equipped with a boomerang and has a slight speedboost.
stats.upgradeDescription: Comes with a fairly upgraded engine and basic set.

stats.description: A standard model for space explorers.
stats.name: T1 Winger

stats.description: This ship is really heavy and slow due to its enormous shield batteries and thick plating. If you need to escort someone and tank enemy fire, this is your choice.
stats.name: Tanker A1
stats.specialDescription: Concussion spheres lower the damage output of enemies and bounces between targets.
stats.upgradeDescription: To cope with deadly strangers this ship has an excellent defense matrix and high power batteries. The only downside is that it is a bit slow.

stats.description: Assembled using old UHF antennas, it's a special ship with incredible shields.
stats.name: Transmitter

stats.description: Want to ride in style? This ship make sure you don't pass by unnoticed.
stats.name: Traveller

stats.description: todo...
stats.name: Trax
stats.specialDescription: todo...
stats.upgradeDescription: todo...

stats.description: All history of its makers have been lost in time, a relic of a golden age of an unknown civilisation. It holds immense power, but we do not have the capabilities nor the knowledge to fully unleash its real potential. It has an unknown house emblem on both wings.The Vanquisher is a difficult ship to use but with great potential for those which can master it.
stats.name: Vanquisher
stats.specialDescription: It comes with three weapons.- Gauss Cannon GAU-186- Cruise Missiles VX-23- Plasma Flares HG-168The weapons can not be copied.
stats.upgradeDescription: Has an unknown material encasing all the hull, seemingly making it very sturdy. Its power core seems to be working autonomously.

stats.description: In a secret collaboration by Doctor Drak and Professor Xhargreg, they developed this with magnificent toxic weaponry. This ship is sleek, fast, and perfect for anyone who wishes to strike fear into their foes.
stats.name: Venom V-30
stats.specialDescription: Venom V30 comes with Poison Arrow, a charge up long range weapon, and Viper Fangs, a medium range high damag busrt weapon.Viper Fangs CAN NOT be coppied.
stats.upgradeDescription: Venom V30 comes prepackaged with a durable hull and shielding, to survive the onslught of its enemies.

stats.description: A kinetic oriented assault machine with an agile shield defense grid. Famous for its spike strip weaponry and built in hydralic fusion booster.
stats.name: Vulture
stats.specialDescription: Kinetic damage and engine capacity is increased by the hydralic fusion booster.
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship is delivered with both armor and engine upgrades.

stats.description: The X-121 Carrier is a state of the art drone control ship. It can rapidly construct and launch several types of drones.
stats.name: X-121 Carrier
stats.specialDescription: The Advance X-121 comes with three types of drones and a target painter.
stats.upgradeDescription: The X-121 carrier is heavily armoured, it comes with a fully upgraded armor tech.

stats.description: The X-34 Carrier was constructed to control the lesser regions of Antor system with its drone construction technology.
stats.name: X-34 Carrier
stats.specialDescription: Can construct a new X-32 fighter drone in just a few seconds.
stats.upgradeDescription: Produced with basic armor and engine.

stats.description: Bwok bwok bwak bwok... BWAK!It's clearly a chicken... if you just ignore the bug legs...The great scientist Xhargreg have created a vastly improved chicken... just in time for easter! How could life get any better?
stats.name: Xhargregs Mutated Chicken
stats.specialDescription: Bwok bwok! BWOK!
stats.upgradeDescription: BWAK!

stats.description: The Y2K V-16 was originally designed a a firework launch platform. However, the technology used was far too advanced for its purpose, it didn't take long until someone figured out the ship was suitable for launching fireworks at your friends and foes alike.
stats.name: Y2K V-16
stats.specialDescription: It comes with nuclear powered fireworks, which is clearly safe...
stats.upgradeDescription: The ship comes with standard armor, shields, engine, and power systems.
